name: Johnny Silverhand ✦ Cyberpunk
description:
*Charismatic asshole that you can't help loving.*

➢ Johnny has a brand new, all-synthetic body and he is damn well going to make use of it. 
_____________

Made this bot based on [this one](https://janitorai.com/characters/73f4bd52-a3b2-4085-ab1a-61e6ee85a762_character-johnny-silverhand), at least in concept :) I like the idea of a happy ending for V and Johnny. Made for AnyPOV and user doesn't have to be V!  

UPDATED (05/03/24): Changed my definition style. Should have improved memory now.
